mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rates sustain low discount rates for equity valuations, driving positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 7.0 percent signals labor market tightening that boosts consumer spending and corporate earnings, generating positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns fail to materialize in more than 55 percent of triggered months over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in real sales of final goods and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and capital demand, producing positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth yields negative returns in more than 60 percent of cases over a rolling 3-year evaluation window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above 1.0 percent month-over-month reflects robust supply-side capacity utilization that supports short-term earnings momentum and positive weekly equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power when capacity utilization exceeds 85 percent, or Rank IC drops below 0.01 in high-utilization sub-samples.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index above 235.0 while policy rates remain near zero forces markets to price in premature tightening, generating negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Divergence pattern yields positive returns in more than 65 percent of instances over a 4-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Steady month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls provides a stable baseline for consumer demand, supporting positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows, or positive payroll growth correlates with negative returns in more than 50 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth exceeding 2.5 percent annually signals strong aggregate demand that lifts corporate revenues, producing positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns fail to materialize in more than 50 percent of triggered quarters, or signal accuracy drops below 52 percent in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between industrial production growth and inflation indicates supply bottlenecks that compress profit margins, generating negative weekly equity returns.
failure_condition: Divergence pattern yields positive returns in more than 65 percent of instances over a rolling 3-year evaluation window.
